title: Active Customers With High-Value Orders
description: Retrieve all customers and include only their orders above 150. Customers without qualifying orders should still appear.
sql_solution: SELECT c.id, o.amount FROM customers c LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id AND o.amount > 150;
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *

result = (
    customers.alias("c")
    .join(
        orders.alias("o"),
        (col("c.id") == col("o.customer_id")) & (col("o.amount") > 150),
        "left"
    )
    .select(col("c.id").alias("id"), col("o.amount").alias("amount"))
)
